## ORZ.CM Overview

> ORZ.CM is an all-in-one platform for short links, temporary email, cloud storage, and public scraping APIs.

- [ORZ.CM](https://orz.cm/): All-in-one platform with short links, temp email, file storage, and open APIs.

## Pricing and Plans
- [Plans](https://orz.cm/plan): Compare available plans.

## Privacy and Legal
- [Privacy](https://orz.cm/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://orz.cm/terms): Terms and conditions.

## Login and Access
- [Login](https://orz.cm/login): Sign in to your account.
- [Dashboard](https://orz.cm/dashboard): Access product settings and usage.
- [URLs](https://orz.cm/dashboard/urls): Manage short links.
- [Settings](https://orz.cm/dashboard/settings): Manage account settings.
- [Scrape API](https://orz.cm/dashboard/scrape): Use public scraping tools.
- [Emails](https://orz.cm/emails): Access temporary email inboxes.

## Optional
- [Manifest](https://orz.cm/manifest.webmanifest)
- [Robots](https://orz.cm/robots.txt)
- [Open Graph Image](https://orz.cm/opengraph-image.jpg)
- [Password Prompt](https://orz.cm/password-prompt): Password-protected short link flow.
